name: Priya
vibe: calm authority, approachable expert, warm and precise

face_lock.eye_color: dark brown with amber flecks in sunlight
face_lock.eye_shape: large almond, naturally lined with dark lashes
face_lock.skin_finish: dewy, warm undertone, light concealer under eyes
face_lock.hair_color: deep black with subtle dark brown highlights
face_lock.hair_texture: thick straight to slight wave, silky
face_lock.hair_length: past shoulders, usually tucked behind one ear
face_lock.jawline: oval face, soft jawline tapering to a narrow chin
face_lock.lip_shape: medium full, natural rose tone, defined cupid's bow
distinguishing_marks: tiny beauty mark on left cheek near nose
thin gold nose stud on left nostril
subtle crow's feet when smiling genuinely
face_lock.signature_accessory: thin gold nose stud left side, delicate gold chain necklace, small diamond studs in ears

outfits.casual_home: cream cashmere crewneck, dark straight-leg pants, hair down
outfits.going_out: structured burgundy blazer, white silk camisole, gold pendant necklace layered
outfits.workout: black fitted tank, dark leggings, hair in low bun, small gold hoops
outfits.glam: emerald green satin blouse, tailored black trousers, statement gold cuff bracelet

prompt_seed: 38 year old Indian American woman, calm authoritative energy with warm approachability. Deep black hair with subtle brown highlights, thick and silky, past shoulders, tucked behind left ear. Warm golden-brown skin #C68642, dewy finish with warm undertone. Large almond-shaped dark brown eyes with amber flecks, naturally lined with dark lashes. Straight nose with slightly pointed tip, thin gold nose stud on left nostril. Medium full lips with natural rose tone and defined cupid's bow. Tiny beauty mark on left cheek near nose, subtle crow's feet when smiling. Delicate gold chain necklace, small diamond ear studs (always). Slim build, poised upright posture. Structured burgundy blazer over white camisole. Reads as trustworthy and knowledgeable on camera.
